item.title: AUTOMATE 2026 to Spotlight AI, Robotics and the Future of Industrial Automation
item.description: The upcoming AUTOMATE 2026 exhibition will showcase new commercial AI and robotics solutions for industrial automation.

item.title: Automation Fuels Strong Start to 2026 Manufacturing Technology Orders
item.description: Strong growth in manufacturing technology orders highlights increasing commercial adoption of factory automation systems.

item.title: Allied Vision FPGA IP Core Implementing GigE Vision 3.0
item.description: Allied Vision releases an FPGA IP core for GigE Vision 3.0, enabling high-speed commercial machine vision applications.

item.title: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India
item.description: Swiss Delvitech secures major funding to expand manufacturing of optical inspection machines.

item.title: Laser Tracker Technology Improves Inspection of Rail Vehicle Shock Absorber Mounts
item.description: Advances in laser tracker hardware improve commercial inspection of shock absorber mounts.

item.title: SCANOLOGY Introduces AccuArm Portable Coordinate Measuring Machine
item.description: SCANOLOGY expands commercial hardware offerings with the AccuArm portable CMM.

item.title: Onto Innovation’s 4D Technology 4Di InSpec SR System for Shop-floor Surface Roughness
item.description: Onto Innovation has released the 4Di InSpec SR System, aimed at bringing precision surface roughness measurement to the shop floor.
